# CWE-76 positive: neutralizes < but not URL-encoded equivalents
lang: go
file: CWE-76-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-76 Improper Neutralization of Equivalent Special Elements
// Vulnerable line: strips literal angle brackets only.
func RenderSnippet(c *gin.Context) {
	raw := c.PostForm("snippet")
	safe := strings.ReplaceAll(raw, "<", "")
	safe = strings.ReplaceAll(safe, ">", "")
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/html; charset=utf-8", []byte("<section>"+safe+"</section>"))
}
